name: Athena

skills.name: Divine Awakening
skills.description: Able to move in true form after dying. Deals damage and launches enemies in range when resurrected.Deals extra damage to non-hero units.

skills.name: Holy Advance
skills.description: Dashes ahead with shield up, knocking back the enemy and dealing damagewhile gaining a shield that grants crowd control immunity.

skills.name: Unstoppable Spear
skills.description: Shifts in the target direction and enhances the next Basic Attack, chargingand dealing damage to the enemy. Hitting the same target 3 timessuccessively deals extra damage equal to lost Health.

skills.name: Immovable Aegis
skills.description: Raises a shield that grants crowd control immunity. Damage taken while theshield is up will be returned after a brief delay, dealing damage to enemieswithin range.

tips: Athena is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 54.4% win rate and 0.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Giant's Grip → Boots of Resistance → Blazing Cape → Dragon's Rage → Blood Rage → Overlord's Platemail.
Run Red for stats that match Athena's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Holy Advance → Unstoppable Spear → Immovable Aegis → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
Athena excels into Dharma, Gao Changgong. Avoid blind picking into Sun Bin, Guan Yu without team peel.

Athena sits at Tier B globally (54.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Low pick rate 0.1% — niche in high rank; surprise value if you perfect the kit. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: Is Athena good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Athena is Tier B Assassin with 54.4% win rate, 0.1% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Athena build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Giant's Grip, Boots of Resistance, Blazing Cape, Dragon's Rage, Blood Rage, Overlord's Platemail. Run Red arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Athena?
faqs.answer: Pick Sun Bin, Guan Yu into Athena. Deny Jungling resources early and force fights before Athena completes core items. Athena struggles when the enemy can peel and group them.

faqs.question: Who does Athena counter?
faqs.answer: Athena is strong into Dharma, Gao Changgong according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Athena when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Jungling lane.

faqs.question: Is Athena good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Athena sits at Tier B globally (54.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Low pick rate 0.1% — niche in high rank; surprise value if you perfect the kit. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: What lane should Athena play?
faqs.answer: Athena is tagged Jungling in Camp export (Fighter, Assassin). Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Athena?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Red arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Athena or Wukong — which is better?
faqs.answer: Athena vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Athena has +4.7% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Athena when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Athena?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Assassin picks unless targeting a one-trick.
